prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年 165 名持续上升至 2026 年 135 名，近年排名稳步提升；2022 年声誉偏负面（宿舍条件争议），2026 年无新增负面记录；抖音热度排名第 58 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，报考关注度一般；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中石河子大学无 A- 及以上学科，整体学科实力以农学、医学、师范为特色，但未进入高等级评估序列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，相关 专业报考竞争激烈；江苏省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 52.1 万，按近年物理类占比约 73% 估算，物理类考生约 38 万人，较 2025 年（约 26 万人）大幅增加约 46%，竞争显著加剧；石河子大学位于新疆，距江苏较远，地域偏好对江苏考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在江苏招生占比 约 2–3%，属非重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年计划微幅缩招、江苏省物理类考生大幅增加以及学校排名上升但无强势学科支撑等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 77093 名基础上略有前移；预测最低位次约 75465 名，区间 74965–75965 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 69940→65402→122563 (including an anomaly in Plant Production) →65949→77093. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the rankings have shifted backward over the past 4 years. In 2025, the ranking shifted backward by about 11144 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 77093. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 58 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 82 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 80, a slight decrease of 2 from 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science Main List has steadily risen from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026. In 2022, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to dormitory condition controversies), but no new negative records were found in 2026. It ranks 58th in Douyin popularity (relatively popular), with moderate short video exposure and average application attention. No significant admission cutoff anomalies were observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University had no A- or above disciplines, with overall disciplinary strength characterized by agriculture, medicine, and teacher education, but not entering high-level evaluation sequences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity, leading to intense competition for related majors. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province is approximately 521,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, the number of Physics Category examinees is estimated at around 380,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (approximately 260,000), sharply intensifying competition. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Jiangsu, and geographic preferences somewhat suppress the willingness of Jiangsu candidates to apply. The university's enrollment share in Jiangsu is about 2–3%, making it a non-key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the substantial increase in Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, and the university's rising ranking but lack of strong disciplines, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to shift slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 77093. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 75465, with a range of 74965–75965.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 74965–75965, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Tier 1 majors such as Computer Top Innovation Class and Clinical/Stomatology have higher ranking requirements (approximately 45,000–61,000 in 2025), exceeding the predicted range, and are only suitable for candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit. Tier 2 majors such as Computer Science, Software Engineering, and Accounting are more aligned with the predicted range and can serve as core choices. Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering and Food Science have lower ranking requirements and are suitable for safety.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次前移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招（6→14 人）与历史类考生增加对冲，扩招效应略占主导，预计 2026 年历史类最低位次较 2024 年基准 14582 名明显后移；预测最低位次约 26047 名，区间 25547–26547 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 18258→16606→(no data for 2023)→14582, showing an overall upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 3676 places over the past 3 years; for 2025, based on the 2024 benchmark of 14582; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 8 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 6 in 2024; the 2026 plan is 14, a significant expansion of about 133% compared to 2024, greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science ranking has been rising to 135th in 2026; reputation was slightly negative in 2022 (dormitory condition controversy), no new negative records in 2026; Douyin popularity ranking 58th (relatively hot), attention is moderate; no A- or above disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors mainly include language majors (Arabic, Kazakh, Russian), Law, Journalism, Chinese Language and Literature; social popularity of foreign language majors is generally lukewarm, Law is relatively hot, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, estimated at about 27% of total, is approximately 140,000, a significant increase from 2025 (about 97,000), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in History Category rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (6→14), and the increase in History Category examinees offsetting each other, the expansion effect slightly dominates; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly drop compared to the 2024 benchmark of 14582; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26047, with a range of 25547–26547.
